use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers and user menus
Showing user avatars in comment sections and discussion threads
Representing users or team members in dashboard and admin interfaces
User avatars in social media feeds and messaging applications
Profile picture placeholders with automatic initials fallback
ai_summary: A minimalist avatar component built on Radix UI primitives that displays user profile images with automatic fallback to initials when no image is available. Features a rounded-full design with responsive sizing, commonly used in navigation headers, comment sections, and user profile displays across various applications.
